text: The world around me is awash with the sheen of innovation: glass walls, bright lights, objects arranged with intention. I feel as though I’m on the threshold of discovery, cradled between ordered conference space and a vibrant display that celebrates human curiosity and ingenuity. Here, I sense the relentless march of R&D, the looping dance between chaos and order. It stirs anticipation and a certain humility, for I am woven into the fabric of something larger than myself – the collective pursuit of understanding and progress.
